title: Incredibly Garlicky Filipino Fish Roast
description: A festive Filipino dish featuring roasted fish with a garlicky almond crust, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the fish and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, combine garlic, almonds, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and blend until well combined.
Place the fish in a roasting pan and brush the garlic almond mixture evenly over both sides of the fish.
Roast the fish in the preheated oven for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the fish from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Slice the fish into serving portions and garnish with sliced almonds and lemon wedges.
